mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in industrial production indicates improving output and operating leverage, raising expected equity earnings and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month INDPRO growth has a walk-forward Rank IC below 0.03 for 3 consecutive years or triggered positive trends do not outperform negative trends.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment rises quickly, investors reprice recession risk and earnings downgrades, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its 6-month moving average by at least 0.3 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if instances of the UNRATE crossing condition have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations or no downside skew versus baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Rising policy rates combined with accelerating consumer prices tightens financial conditions and raises discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its 12-month average while CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation exceeds its 12-month average
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with inflation pressure
failure_condition: Reject if the joint tightening-inflation trigger is followed by nonnegative median 60-day returns or if the interaction term is insignificant at p > 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strength in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad household demand, supporting revenue expectations and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month change and HOUST 3-month change are both above zero
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive demand trigger has median 20-day returns below the unconditional median or a hit rate below 50% after transaction-date alignment.

mechanism_narrative: A material decline in the federal funds rate signals easing liquidity and lower discount rates, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses below its level from 3 months earlier by at least 0.25 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if rate-cut triggers have average 60-day returns less than or equal to unconditional average returns over a full walk-forward sample.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in industrial production signals an earnings and inventory correction, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as markets adjust.
failure_condition: Reject if the INDPRO contraction trigger is followed by positive 5-day returns in more than 60% of cases or has no negative mean return differential.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent payroll growth reflects rising labor income and business confidence, supporting consumption and earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month PAYEMS growth fails to rank future 60-day returns with Rank IC above 0.03 in at least half of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer prices together with falling retail sales indicates a real-income squeeze, weakening revenue expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month change is positive while RSAFS 3-month change crosses below zero
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-RSAFS squeeze trigger has median 20-day returns above zero or does not underperform periods with positive RSAFS growth.
